description: Synthetic checklist for endocrinology referrals. Not a clinical guideline.

required_items.label: A1c trend over time
required_items.why_it_matters: A trend helps the specialist understand glycemic trajectory.

required_items.label: Recent fasting glucose
required_items.why_it_matters: Recent glucose context helps frame referral urgency and education needs.

required_items.label: Recent kidney function context
required_items.why_it_matters: Kidney function context can affect medication review and referral planning.

required_items.label: Medication history and adherence context
required_items.why_it_matters: Medication history helps the specialist avoid duplicative questions.

required_items.label: Weight or BMI context
required_items.why_it_matters: Weight context may be relevant to metabolic referral review.

required_items.label: Diabetes diagnosis documented
required_items.why_it_matters: The referral packet should clearly state the condition under review.
